properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4 v2 v2 v2 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a power that's made perfect in my weakness Fills me up with a strength that is fearless I find hope within Your everlasting promise It fans my faith into flame

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm living with a fire burning inside of me I'm living for the Savior, Jesus eternally With all that I am, Lord, I give You my heart So let the flame shine brighter Let Your praise sing louder

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In a moment You turn mourning into dancing When I praise I can feel the darkness trembling All my fear is swept away by perfect love You fan my faith into flame

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No darkness can stand against this brighter glory His promise is sure, Jesus decides my story No darkness can stand against this brighter glory His promise is sure, Jesus decides my story No darkness can stand against this brighter glory His promise is sure, Jesus decides my story, oh! 'Cause I'm living…

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So let the flame shine brighter Let Your praise sing louder So let the flame shine brighter Let Your praise sing louder
